HGSS.637.0001:
Pardon? I can’t hear you very well...
We must have a bad connection.\f
Try calling again from somewhere else!
HGSS.637.0002:
Hello...
Oh, hiya, what’s up?\r
Things are sweet over here!\f
HGSS.637.0003:
There’s a lot of Gym Leaders who are
way stronger than me.\r
We’ve both got to work harder!
HGSS.637.0004:
My schedule’s fairly open on Sunday
mornings.\f
Try calling me then, OK?
HGSS.637.0005:
I’ve got some free time right now.
Would you like to meet for a\r
battle or something? [0200,0000]
HGSS.637.0006:
Yay, I’m happy! I’ve got another thing
to look forward to now.\f
I’ll be waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City.
HGSS.637.0008:
Huh?
Wait, didn’t you already make enough\r
other appointments before you called?
HGSS.637.0009:
I’ll be waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City. Please don’t forget!
HGSS.637.0010:
This is Erika.
How are you?\f
HGSS.637.0011:
I’m waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City...\r
You haven’t forgotten, have you?
HGSS.637.0012:
Do you like plants?
Plants are such delicate things.\f
The amount of water,
the condition of the soil,\r
the temperature differences,\r
the changing weather...\r
All those little things we don’t think\r
about can have such a huge effect.
HGSS.637.0013:
Do you like telling fortunes?\f
Me...
I don’t really like the kind where you\r
pull off flower petals...\f
Oh, but it’s not that I dislike the
fortune-teller in Lavender Town.
HGSS.637.0014:
What do you do on your days off?\f
I like to tend to the plants in my Gym,
transplanting them and dusting\r
off the flowers and leaves with a brush.\r
It keeps me pretty busy...
